# Temozolomide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Temozolomide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Temozolomide</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Temozolomide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Temomedac hard capsules is indicated for the treatment of:  adult patients with newly diagnosed glioblastoma multiforme concomitantly with radiotherapy (RT) and subsequently as monotherapy treatment;...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>adult astrocytic tumour（99.4%）</li>
<li>cauda equina neoplasm（99.3%）</li>
<li>astrocytoma (excluding glioblastoma)（99.3%）</li>
<li>childhood cerebral astrocytoma（97.5%）</li>
<li>cerebellar astrocytoma（97.4%）</li>
<li>subependymal giant cell astrocytoma（97.4%）</li>
<li>brain glioblastoma（97.4%）</li>
<li>diencephalic astrocytomas（97.3%）</li>
<li>astrocytic tumor（97.2%）</li>
<li>high grade astrocytic tumor（97.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/temozolomide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
